# Zawya

> Zawya is a private spiritual community PWA for the suhba community — families view gatherings, RSVP, coordinate flexible potlucks, and check in at events.

Most of the application is gated behind authentication and member approval, so the public surface is intentionally limited.

## Pages

- [Home / Sign in](/): Entry point and sign-in for community members.

## Optional

- [Community Guidelines](/guidelines): Community guidelines for members.
